# podfly

> Deploy Serverpod on existing cloud infrastructure via each provider’s CLI.
> Not a host — orchestrates fly, railway, wrangler, neonctl, etc., and encodes config quirks.

## Start here

- [README](README.md) — mission, provider roadmap, install from pub.dev, quick start
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — agent rules and decision tree
- [doc/guide.md](doc/guide.md) — commands, flags, automation, troubleshooting
- [doc/ci.md](doc/ci.md) — GitHub Actions / CI tokens and workflows
- [doc/podfly.yaml.md](doc/podfly.yaml.md) — full config reference

## Core docs

- [doc/caching.md](doc/caching.md) — Flutter web WASM, service worker, Cache-Control
- [doc/database.md](doc/database.md) — none / sqlite / fly_postgres / railway_postgres / neon
- [doc/README.md](doc/README.md) — docs index
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) — releases
- [doc/specs/](doc/specs/) — design history

## Examples

- [example/mobile_api_only](example/mobile_api_only) — API-only Serverpod on Fly + GitHub Actions (`deploy.yml` on every push to main)

## Default commands (copy-paste)

```bash
# Install (pub.dev)
dart pub global activate podfly

# After serverpod create (or in existing Serverpod monorepo)
podfly deploy --yes --smoke

# Plan only
podfly deploy --yes --dry-run --no-login

# API only (mobile clients)
podfly deploy --api --yes --smoke

# Railway
podfly deploy --host railway --api --yes --smoke

# Checks
podfly doctor
podfly smoke
```

## Supported today

| Layer | Providers |
|-------|-----------|
| API **deploy** | Fly, Railway, DigitalOcean, Render, Cloud Run, AWS App Runner |
| API **host choice** | Wizard: fly, railway, render, cloud_run, aws, azure, digitalocean |
| UI | Cloudflare Pages (`wrangler`) when `mode: split` + `web.enabled`; Railway/DO native web |
| DB | none, sqlite, fly_postgres, railway_postgres, digitalocean_postgres, render_postgres, neon |
| UI (native) | Railway static nginx; DigitalOcean separate web app; Cloud Run/App Runner monolith nginx |

**App Runner (`host: aws`):** HTTP RPC + optional Flutter monolith packaging. **No WebSockets** (edge Envoy 403). Streams: Cloud Run or future ECS+ALB (`doc/aws.md`, `doc/specs/2026-07-21-aws-ecs-realtime-sketch.md`).

## Hard rules for agents

1. Prefer Serverpod’s `*_server/Dockerfile` — do not invent Python or random images.
2. Build Flutter web inside the Flutter package (podfly does this).
3. Template Serverpod auth ≠ needs Postgres (soft warning only).
4. No `web/` + android/ios → API-only (`web.enabled: false`).
5. Podfly auto-creates Fly apps and sanitizes names (`_` → `-`). Railway: project + service + domain + `railway up`.
6. **Do not require Fly CLI** when `host:` is railway/render/etc. — only that host’s CLI (`~/.railway/bin` is searched).
7. Deploy implemented for fly, railway, digitalocean, render, cloud_run, aws (App Runner). Azure: doctor only.
8. Fly Postgres: ensure API app **before** attach; use attach `DATABASE_URL` (sidecar), not superuser placeholders.

## Package

- Binary: `podfly`
- pub.dev: https://pub.dev/packages/podfly
- Repo: https://github.com/127thousand/podfly
- Skill: `.grok/skills/podfly/SKILL.md`
